Our first superfood launch

Details
Description
Popped lotus seeds
Details
Foxnuts, also known as lotus seeds, are airy light and delicately crunchy. Naturally rich in plant protein, fiber, and essential minerals, they offer clean, sustained superfood energy.
Status
Available for orders now
